channel.title: Dotgov on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Dotgov on adoption curve dot net

item.title: What did the Romans ever do for us?
item.description: Over the weekend Emma Mulqueeny of Rewired State put up a blog post which has sparked something of a discussion (or possibly a shitstorm, depending on your viewpoint). This is what I wrote in response (it’s currently in a moderation queue), but it seemed worth an extended rant on my site. I think we’re all agreed that there’s something fundamentally broken with the current state of big Government IT. We’re stuck in a loop of paying premium prices for sub-standard products - and up until now entrenched vested interests having been calling the shots.
